name: b2b-exam-platform-app
description: Secure Electron exam platform with anti-cheating measures

scripts.build:unpack: npm run clean && vite build && electron-builder --dir
scripts.build:win: npm run clean && vite build && electron-builder --win
scripts.build:mac: npm run clean && vite build && electron-builder --mac
scripts.build:linux: npm run clean && vite build && electron-builder --linux
